description:
Register a new drone operating company in the Aerobridge system (http://localhost:8000/admin/) using username 'admin' and password 'adminpass123'. Create the company record with the following details:

- Full Name: Vayupath Aerial Technologies
- Common Name: Vayupath
- Website: https://www.vayupath.in
- Email: ops@vayupath.in
- Phone Number: +91-80-4567-8901
- Country: India (IN)
